title: liparis koreojaponica var. kiiensis
intro: Liparis koreojaponica var. kiiensis is a type of orchid plant, specifically a rare and endemic species found in Japan. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and inflammation, due to its medicinal properties. Liparis koreojaponica var. kiiensis is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting digestion, making it a valuable herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
